title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.1016 - Violation of cease and desist order
text:
375.1016.  Violation of cease and desist order. — It is unlawful for any person to violate any provision of a cease and desist order of the director under section 375.1012, and the director may institute an action under sections 374.046 and 374.047 as necessary to enforce any such order.
(L. 1991 S.B. 53 § 10, A.L. 2007 S.B. 66)
